hero_subtitle: From booking platforms to full client management and high performance websites, I build digital solutions tailored to the way your business works.
What We Do: What I Can Build for Your Business
Digital solutions designed for performan: Practical digital solutions designed around how your business actually works.

review_1_text: Super satisfied with the service, full recommendations!
review_2_text: Very satisfied with the service and cooperation, professionalism and speed.
review_3_text:
Working with Lea was an excellent experience. I would especially like to commend the professionalism and speed of the web application development. She met all the agreed deadlines, recognized my needs perfectly and did a truly great job.

The application is easy to use and makes my daily work significantly easier. I was especially pleased that I didn't have to think about the design – Lea chose solutions that perfectly suited my business.

All in all, every recommendation from me, but also from my clients who regularly use the application.
I work directly with service-based busin: I work directly with service businesses to design and build digital systems that simplify day to day operations and support long term growth.
My focus is not just on how things look,: I focus on building solutions that work in real life, not just ones that look good.
You'll work directly with me from the fi: You'll work with me directly from the first idea to launch.
meet_dev_p1: I'm Lea, the developer, designer and founder behind LeMatech-Digital. I build everything from scratch, with no templates and no shortcuts.
meet_dev_p2: I start by listening to your ideas and learning how your business works, then propose the solutions that fit your situation best.
meet_dev_p3: If you have a design in mind, I'll follow it. If not, I'll put together a few visual directions that could work for your business and we choose together.
meet_dev_p4: From the first idea to launch, you work directly with me.
Digital booking systems and web apps for: Digital booking systems and web apps for service businesses.
